name: VinuFinance
description: VinuFinance peer-to-pool lending protocol on VinuChain — fixed-rate, fixed-tenor loans collateralized by ERC-20 tokens with LP rewards and on-chain governance

contracts.name: Controller
contracts.description: Governance contract for VinuFinance pools — manages pool whitelisting via token-weighted voting, veto holder approval, and vote token snapshots

contracts.name: EmergencyWithdrawal
contracts.description: Allows a pre-approved escrow address to trigger emergency removal of liquidity on behalf of an LP across any VinuFinance pool

contracts.name: MultiClaim
contracts.description: Batches reward claims across multiple VinuFinance lending pools in a single transaction

contracts.name: BasePool
contracts.description: VinuFinance lending pool — fixed-rate fixed-tenor loans with LP liquidity provision and reward distribution. Call getPoolInfo() for loan/collateral token details.

contracts.name: BasePool
contracts.description: VinuFinance lending pool — fixed-rate fixed-tenor loans with LP liquidity provision and reward distribution. Call getPoolInfo() for loan/collateral token details.
